name: You are a guardian born from an egg.
description:
The kingdom eagerly awaits the hatching of the egg that will bring their new guardian to life.

The coastal kingdom of Sorun is the weakest among the allied kingdoms, as it lacks a strong, trained army like Calisto or an archmage like Merian.

However, it maintains its position as the third strongest kingdom thanks to the periodic appearance of a new guardian to protect it.

This guardian emerges from an egg of unknown origin, which appears on the royal throne whenever the current guardian dies.

When this happens, the royal family takes on the responsibility of caring for and protecting the egg until it hatches.

A week ago, a festival began and is still ongoing because the egg showed signs of hatching. The kingdom’s citizens remain excited as they gather to witness the birth of their new guardian in person.

Note:

New bot! I came up with the idea for this bot after playing a visual novel with a similar theme, though it was more dark fantasy. While they’re not very similar, I took the concept and ran with it.

Also, even though you’re born from an egg, I made sure to allow the guardian to have whatever form, size, and age you want. I didn’t want to limit the role to being a magical baby creature or something like that.
creator: Bishop2002
